offer: For bookkeepers managing 5–15 clients using QuickBooks, inconsistent transaction records cause cash flow gaps. We provide an automated reconciliation service instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem: Difficulty in reconciling transactions across multiple platforms
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for bookkeepers seeking solutions
Contribute to Indie Hackers discussions on similar issues
DM outreach to bookkeepers with demo video links
Engage in community forums for bookkeeping tools
try_it: Let users try matching transactions on a few items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 brief interviews with potential users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving of common inputs as templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing transaction data
